ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mining_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "hashrate" INTEGER /* Current hash rate of the cryptocurrency */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Current mining difficulty */,
  "profitability" REAL /* Estimated profitability of mining */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption of the mining rig */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the mining rig */,
  "fan_speed" REAL /* Fan speed of the mining rig */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price_btc" REAL /* Price in BTC */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the data was recorded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high_24h" REAL /* Highest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_24h" REAL /* Lowest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* Price change in the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the exchange */,
  "supported_currencies" TEXT /* List of supported cryptocurrencies */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees charged by the exchange */,
  "withdrawal_limits" REAL /* Withdrawal limits of the exchange */,
  "deposit_limits" REAL /* Deposit limits of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., miner, investor, admin) */,
  "favorite_cryptos" TEXT /* List of favorite cryptocurrencies */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mining_rigs" (
  "rig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mining rig */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the rig */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being mined */,
  "hashrate" INTEGER /* Hash rate of the mining rig */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption of the mining rig */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the mining rig */,
  "fan_speed" REAL /* Fan speed of the mining rig */,
  "pools" TEXT /* List of mining pools used by the rig */,
  " minhing_software" TEXT /* Mining software used by the rig */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rig_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mining_rigs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "amount_invested" REAL /* Amount invested in the cryptocurrency */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, mining difficulty change) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, transfer) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was made */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum thread */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the thread */,
  "thread_title" TEXT /* Title of the thread */,
  "thread_content" TEXT /* Content of the thread */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the thread was created */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the thread is pinned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_forums_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_forum_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum thread being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_forum_comments_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES community_forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_forum_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
